rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §21.0462, which governs school counselor certification qualifications. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: The qualifications for certification as a school counselor may not include a requirement that a candidate for certification have experience as a classroom teacher.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to proposed change; no conflict exists.
